zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Delves於1295年出生在英國斯塔福爾德爾維斯時，他的父親John Delves31歲，母親Mrs John Delves36歲。他於1315年與Amicia在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾度丁頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1339年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Delves于1295年出生在英国斯塔福爾德爾維斯时，他的父亲John Delves31岁，母亲Mrs John Delves36岁。他于1315年与Amicia在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾度丁頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1339年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Delves was born in 1295, in Delves, Staffordshire, England, his father, John Delves, was 31 and his mother, Mrs John Delves, was 36. He married Amicia in 1315, in Duddington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1339, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Delves est né en 1295, à Delves, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Delves, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Delves, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Amicia en 1315, à Duddington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1339, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Delves 1295 in Delves, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Delves 31 und seine Mutter Mrs John Delves 36. Er hat 1315 in Duddington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Amicia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1339 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Delves è nato il nel 1295 nel Delves, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John Delves, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John Delves, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Amicia nel 1315, nel Duddington, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1339, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Delves(이)가 1295년 영국 스태퍼드실르 델브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Delves(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Delves(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 드딩턴에서 Amicia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Delves nasceu em 1295, em Delves, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Delves, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Delves, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Amicia em 1315, em Duddington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1339, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Delves родился в 1295 г. в местности делвесь, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Delves было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Delves, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Amicia в 1315 г. в местности дуддингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1339 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Delves nació en 1295, en Delves, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Delves, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs John Delves, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Amicia en 1315, en Duddington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1339, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
